Beginning: ^Hey, it's been a long day. I'm going to bed now. I'll see you tomorrow, right?
^Why are you going to bed this early?

c-1: ^I'm tired, Lucy. Long day tomorrow. Night.

Ghost: ^I'm looking for my sister. Have you seen her?

c-0: ^Ahh, her. Yes, I saw her a few hours ago.
^I saw her walk to the park.

YoungBoy: ^Who are you? My mom said I shouldn't talk to strangers.

c-0: ^Who are you looking for? Did they get lost? I get lost sometimes, that's why my mom tells me to wait for her.
^Hmm, I'm not supposed to talk to strangers, but if my sister was lost I think she would be scared.
^I did see a girl here earlier, she was sitting on the bench crying, but then she just left.

c-1: ^She said im not supposed to talk to strangers.

Cop: ^Where do I report a missing person?

c-0: ^Do you want to file a missing person report?
^Where do I report a missing person?

missing_person: ^I'm not sure, she wasn't in her bed when I woke up.

c-0: ^So she has been missing for less than 24 hours? Then you can't file a report.
^But I know she wouldn't just run away!
^I wouldn't be so sure, people run away for different reasons.

OldLady: ^Oh darling are you alright? You look stressed...

c-0: ^Maybe she will be back soon, don't worry. Did she leave you a note?
^Well now that you mentioned it, a young girl borrowed my phone to make a call. Said she lost hers.
^Did she say who she was calling?
^She never said his name, but she said he might be her father. Not sure what she meant by that.
^Oh, you are sisters? you look nothing alike.

c-1: ^You should take a rest if you are tierd. Young people these days never know when to rest.

c-0: ^Well I hope you find them, maybe they will be back later darling.
